hero.subtitle: "Leading the community toward a zero-waste ecosystem through innovation and collective responsibility."

intro.label: Who We Are
intro.title: The RU Identity
paragraphs: Rooted in the vision of Motherland Secondary School to provide "Quality Education For Everyone", the RU Club Motherland serves as a dynamic platform where environmental awareness meets collective action.
We believe true education extends beyond the classroom — into our communities and natural spaces. Supported by The Government of Nepal, KOICA Nepal, Doko Recyclers, and UNDP.

cards.title: Tree Plantation
cards.description: Organizing community tree plantation drives to restore green cover in Pokhara region.

cards.title: Waste Management
cards.description: Promoting zero-waste practices and proper waste segregation in communities.

cards.title: Awareness Education
cards.description: Conducting workshops and campaigns to educate students and communities.

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.subtitle: Be part of the change. Together, we can create a sustainable future for Pokhara.
